name: StreetLib
description: StreetLib partner API for book-publishing partner workflows. Public partner docs expose account onboarding and reference data; distribution/book-submission endpoints may require StreetLib partner enablement.

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Partner API key
credential_fields.description: StreetLib partner API key. Partner/distribution access may need to be enabled by StreetLib.

tools.name: list_countries
tools.description: Get StreetLib country IDs for partner user signup.

tools.name: list_timezones
tools.description: Get StreetLib timezone values for partner user signup.

tools.name: affiliate_signup
tools.description: Create a new StreetLib user under a partner account.

body.description: StreetLib UserRequest payload from the partner API documentation.
